creator: garga@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jakob Alvermark from comment #0)
Can you please share more information about your environment?

- FreeBSD ARCH
- are you testing on 13.2-RELEASE or 13.2-STABLE?
- Are you building sudo package locally using ports or installed binary package from FreeBSD repo?
- If you are building, what are the OPTIONS selected?
- Please share sudo config files
- What exactly command you are running when it happens?
